CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MARC PAISIN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. PL. OPENING STATEMENT. DEF. OPENING STATEMENT. PL. WIT, BRYANT MORRISON, S&E. PL. WIT, DAVID CZERWINSKI, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, TESTIFIES IN NARRATIVE. PL. CLOSING ARGUMENT. DEF. CLOSING ARGUMENT. EXH. RETAINED BY COURT. CASE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION & COURT TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CZERWINSKI, DAVID $2,570.35 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,275.35

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CZERWINSKI, DAVID $2,570.35 PRINCIPAL, $600.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,275.35
